summary: DressApp Phase 4 testing completed - Google Calendar OAuth 2.0 and Trend-Scout agent features tested. Most functionality working correctly with some minor issues identified.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Manual trend generation may fail due to timeout

operational_notes.impact: Some Gemini calls return BudgetExceeded - affects Trend-Scout generation and fresh stylist calls
operational_notes.note: This is an external account issue, not a DressApp bug

design_issues.issue: Date display format not showing as expected 'DAILY EDIT · YYYY-MM-DD'

passed_tests: GET /api/v1/calendar/status returns correct disconnected state for new user
GET /api/v1/calendar/upcoming returns empty events array for disconnected user
GET /api/v1/auth/google/start generates valid Google OAuth URL with correct parameters
Google OAuth URL contains proper client_id, scopes (openid+email+profile+calendar.readonly), access_type=offline, prompt=consent
GET /api/v1/trends/latest returns trend cards including sustainability card with AFTERCARE tag
POST /api/v1/stylist regression test passes (returns 200 with advice)
APScheduler running correctly with 'Trend-Scout scheduler started (daily at 07:00 UTC)' message
Profile page renders Calendar Connect card with correct title, disconnected badge, and Connect button
Calendar Connect button triggers /auth/google/start API call and redirects to accounts.google.com
Stylist page calendar switch toggles correctly and shows occasion input for disconnected users
Home page Trend-Scout feed displays 3 trend cards with proper content
OAuth callback query parameter handling works (strips params from URL)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider increasing timeout for /trends/run-now-dev endpoint and verify date display format in Trend-Scout section. The Emergent LLM Key budget issue is external and expected.
